headline: Assessing Abbott Laboratories (ABT) Valuation After New Diabetes Sensor And Cancer Screening Tailwinds
summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) is back in focus after it expanded its collaboration with MiniMed on dual glucose ketone sensors and received fresh support from the American Cancer Society for its Cologuard colorectal cancer screening tests. See our latest analysis for Abbott Laboratories. Even with supportive news on diabetes sensors and cancer screening, Abbott’s recent share price return tells a different story, with the stock down about 22% over 90 days and its 1-year total shareholder return...
